Title: Osney Bridge towpath diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed ~150 yards before bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road to Botley Road.

Title: Marsh Lock Horsebridge closure Henley
Description: Footbridge closed due to safety concerns. 3-mile diversion via A4155 pavement.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge closed north of Sandford Lock. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway intermittent closure
Description: Walkway closed when river levels high. Due to corrosion. Re-routed via town centre.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Bridge closed since May 2023 due to structural concerns. Unlikely reopened until 2028.

Title: Bridge 142 closure Egham
Description: Footbridge closure due to tree damage. Diversion via A308/Causeway.

Title: Bell Weir Lock diversion Runnymede
Description: Thames Path diverted around construction compound at Runnymede Pleasure Grounds.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Eroded towpath diverted inland. Unlikely to reopen until late 2026.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: Island closed due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected but island inaccessible.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Bridge closed March 2024 due to structural safety concerns. No reopening date.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal between Brent and Brentford Marina.
